name: Lobster and Pistachio
steps: Store under wet towel in the fridge.
Break lobster at head. Reserve coral (if any).
Vacuum freeze or store accordingly to make oil.
Freeze heads or store under pressure and push through half the shell of the lobster.
Dip tail in water at 74 degrees for 9-12 minutes.
Tip: Should be portion as per lobster service.
Store outside fridge on a tray, cling filmed and protected.
Finely chop the garlic, leeks, and onion, then sweat them in a little olive oil without browning.
Add the vinegar and reduce. Once reduced, add the fish stock and cook for another 2 minutes.
Finally add the vegetable stock and pistachio and bring to the boil.
Remove from heat and blend to a smooth.
